# QuoteCore+

> QuoteCore+ is construction quoting and job-management software for roofers, builders, and trade contractors.

QuoteCore+ helps contractors upload plans, measure areas and lengths, build priced quotes, send customer-ready proposals, track quote approvals, create materials orders, manage accepted jobs, and invoice on completion.

## Product pages

- [Construction quoting software](https://quote-core.com/construction-quoting-software)
- [Roofing quoting software](https://quote-core.com/roofing-quoting-software)
- [Free trial](https://quote-core.com/free-trial)
